title: No test for apply_member_patch role validation
description: apply_member_patch is the only enforcement point preventing arbitrary role strings from being persisted in the space_members table and returned to clients. There is no test exercising the invalidArguments path for bad roles, the invalidPatch path for unknown patch paths, or the remove-member null-value path. Maintenance consequence: any extension to the patch loop that bypasses apply_member_patch, or any store refactor, can introduce invalid role values with no failing test.
